setupStatus.title: Mirror-setupstatus
setupStatus.notProbedYet: Er is nog geen probe uitgevoerd — klik op Vernieuwen om deze host te controleren.
setupStatus.notReady: Vereiste tooling voor {{pm}} ontbreekt — installeer voordat u een synchronisatie start.
setupStatus.subtitle: Vereiste tooling om {{pm}}-mirrorplannen op deze host uit te voeren
setupStatus.timedOut: [TODO] Agent did not respond within {{minutes}} minutes. The most likely causes are: the agent crashed mid-plan, the WebSocket dropped before the command_result was sent, or the agent silently de-duplicated the command without emitting a result. Check the agent log on this host and consider restarting the sysmanage-agent service. Click Refresh / Install Tools again to retry — the in-flight marker will be cleared and a fresh attempt dispatched.

mirror.configureSubtitle: Kies de host die de mirrorplannen van dit platform zal uitvoeren. Alleen hosts waarvan het platform overeenkomt met het tabblad worden vermeld.
mirror.deleteConfigInUse: Verwijder eerst de {{n}} mirror(s) onder dit platform.
mirror.noEligibleHosts: Geen geregistreerde {{family}}-hosts beschikbaar — registreer er een en vernieuw.

setupGate.message: Install the required mirror tooling above to enable mirror configuration. Mirror operations stay disabled until the setup probe reports all tools present.
setupGate.preConfigure: Install the required mirror tooling on this host before configuring the platform. The Create button stays disabled until the setup probe reports all tools present.

freshness.title: Repository-versheid
freshness.engineMissing: airgap_repository_engine niet geladen; versheidsgegevens niet beschikbaar.

tooltip.not_transferred: These fixes are not yet on the local mirror. Closing the gap requires another collector → media → repository transfer cycle.
tooltip.not_applied: These fixes are already on the local mirror. No new media transfer needed — the host just has not run its package manager yet.
tooltip.current: Host packages match the most recent mirror state and no public CVE has surfaced since the last transfer.

repositories.title: Air-Gap Repositories
repositories.subtitle: Per-repository statistics for this private-side mirror, plus aggregate freshness.
repositories.notApplicable: This dashboard is only meaningful on repository-role deployments.
repositories.endpointMissing: Backend list-all-repositories endpoint not available; dashboard cannot populate.

cmd.ipfw_kldload: load ipfw kernel module (ok if already loaded)
cmd.ipfw_sysrc_type: set firewall_type to open in rc.conf
cmd.windows_enable: enable Windows Firewall for all profiles

cmd.apt_refresh_mirror: refresh apt cache from sysmanage mirror

cmd.lxc_wait_network: wait for {{container_name}} to acquire network lease
cmd.restart_sysmanage_agent: restart sysmanage-agent to load pushed yaml
cmd.enumerate_child_hosts: enumerate child hosts across all hypervisors
cmd.probe_hypervisor_capabilities: probe hypervisor capabilities on this host
cmd.lxd_init: snap install lxd + init + profile + group
cmd.waiting_wsl_ready: Waiting for WSL instance to be ready

cmd.ensure_libvirt_dirs: ensure libvirt image + cloud-init dirs exist
cmd.remaster_install_iso: re-master install ISO with {{mode}} answer file
cmd.remaster_alpine_apkovl: remaster Alpine ISO with apkovl overlay
cmd.resize_disk: resize disk to {{disk_gb}}G (skip if already larger)
cmd.build_cloudinit_iso_freebsd: build cloud-init seed ISO with bootstrap.sh (FreeBSD)
cmd.wait_ssh_run_bootstrap: wait for VM IP + SSH, then run bootstrap.sh on {{vm}}
cmd.remove_ephemeral_ssh_helper: remove ephemeral SSH key + pty helper from /tmp
cmd.kvm_modules_enable: detect CPU + load KVM module + persist nested config
cmd.kvm_modules_disable: unload KVM modules + remove persistent config
cmd.kvm_init: enable KVM + install libvirt + start daemon
cmd.ensure_bhyve_image_dir: ensure bhyve image cache dir {{dir}} exists
cmd.convert_to_raw: convert/copy decompressed image to raw at {{raw_path}}
cmd.import_raw_as_disk0: import prepared raw image as disk0 for {{vm_name}}
cmd.remove_ephemeral_firstboot: remove ephemeral firstboot + inject scripts from /tmp
cmd.pfctl_reload_nat: reload pf with new NAT rules
cmd.openbsd_autoinstall_prep: OpenBSD {{version}} autoinstall prep (httpd + sets + bsd.rd surgery)
cmd.vmd_reload_alpine: reload vmd with Alpine autoinstall fragment
cmd.wait_install_reconfigure: wait for {{vm_name}} install to complete + reconfigure for disk boot
cmd.remove_ephemeral_alpine_helpers: remove ephemeral Alpine autoinstall helpers from /tmp
cmd.debian_preseed_prep: Debian {{version}} preseed prep (download + repackage ISO + httpd)
cmd.vmd_reload_debian: reload vmd with Debian preseed fragment
cmd.remove_ephemeral_debian_helpers: remove ephemeral Debian preseed helpers from /tmp
cmd.ubuntu_autoinstall_prep: Ubuntu {{version}} autoinstall prep (download + repackage ISO + httpd)
cmd.vmd_reload_ubuntu: reload vmd with Ubuntu autoinstall fragment
cmd.remove_ephemeral_ubuntu_helpers: remove ephemeral Ubuntu autoinstall helpers from /tmp
cmd.vmd_init: vmd init: pick subnet + persist + start service

airgapBundles.dockerNoGroup: [TODO] Docker is running but the {{user}} user is not in the docker group, so the build subprocess cannot reach the daemon socket.
airgapBundles.dockerNotInstalled: [TODO] Docker is not installed on this server. Bundle builds need Docker to fetch per-distro Linux packages.
airgapBundles.dockerNotRunning: [TODO] Docker is installed but the daemon is not reachable. Start it with: sudo systemctl enable --now docker.
airgapBundles.dockerPermissionDenied: [TODO] The Docker daemon is running but the {{user}} user (the one running this sysmanage process) cannot read /var/run/docker.sock. Add the user to the docker group, then restart the sysmanage process so the new group set takes effect.
airgapBundles.dockerReadyHint: [TODO] Builds typically take 5-30 minutes depending on how many platforms are enabled.
airgapBundles.empty: [TODO] No bundles yet. Click a build button above to create one.
airgapBundles.requiresDocker: [TODO] Bundle builds require Docker to be installed and running on this server — needed to fetch per-distro Linux packages. Builds typically take 5-30 minutes depending on how many platforms are enabled.
airgapBundles.subtitle: [TODO] Generate a multi-OS ISO containing sysmanage server or agent + all per-platform dependencies, ready to mount on an air-gapped host.

airgapBundles.resourcesInsufficient: [TODO] This server does not have enough free memory or disk to build a Server or Agent bundle — those buttons are disabled until resources are freed (add swap or grow the VM).

serverRole.loadError: Could not load the current server role.
serverRole.saveError: Could not save the server role.

standard.title: Standard (no air gap)
standard.description: The default. This server manages hosts directly over the network with no air-gap separation. Choose this for any ordinary deployment — it is what every server runs as unless you specifically need one half of an air-gapped pair.

collector.title: Air-Gap Collector (online side)
collector.description: The internet-connected half of an air-gap pair. It mirrors upstream package repositories, gathers CVE and compliance feeds, and bundles them into signed ISO images that you physically carry across the air gap. Choose this on the server that has internet access and builds the media.

repository.title: Air-Gap Repository (disconnected side)
repository.description: The isolated half of an air-gap pair, with no internet access. It ingests the ISO media produced by the Collector, verifies its signature, and serves the packages to managed hosts on the private network so they can update normally. Choose this on the server inside the air-gapped enclave.

serverRole.heading: Server Role
serverRole.intro: Choose how this SysManage server participates in an air-gapped deployment. Most servers should stay on Standard. The role takes effect after the next server restart.
serverRole.restartHint: Restart the SysManage server after saving for the new role to take full effect.
serverRole.saved: Server role saved. Restart the server for it to take full effect.
